headline: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Announces Pricing of Tender Offers for Any and All of its Outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052
summary: MIDLAND, Texas, April 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG) (the “Company” or “Diamondback”) today announced the pricing of its tender offers to purchase for cash (the “Offers”) any and all of its outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 (the “2051 Notes”) and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052 (the “2052 Notes” and, together with the 2051 Notes, the “Notes”). headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Diamondback Energy, Raises Price Target to $245
summary: UBS  analyst Josh Silverstein   maintains Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) with a Buy and raises the price target from $240 to $245.

headline: Diamondback Energy’s Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Diamondback Energy will release its first-quarter earnings next month, and analysts anticipate a double-digit profit dip.
